LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Generic.Reset.Label: Reset
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Settings.Patch.BigAndSmall.Too: Toggle patching Big and Small compatibility with this mod.
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Settings.Patch.IdeoFactIcon.La: Patch Ideoligion Icon as Faction Icon
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Settings.Patch.IdeoFactIcon.To: Toggle patching Ideoligion Icon as Faction Icon compatibility with this mod.
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Settings.Pawn.Minimal.Label: Generate Minimal Pawns
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Settings.Pawn.Minimal.Tooltip: Always generate a minimal pawn, bypassing the standard Rimworld generation method.
Warning: Some mods may break using this method. Use at your own risk.
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Settings.Sections.Resources.Un: Place the resource text values inside of the bar, rather than underneath it.
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Settings.Window.MaxHeight.Tool: The multiplier applied to the preview window's maximum height relative to the screen's height.
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Settings.Window.OffsetX.Label: Horizontal window offset
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Settings.Window.OffsetY.Label: Vertical window offset
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Settings.Window.Offset.Tooltip: Sets the positional offset of the xenotype and preview windows.
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Settings.Window.Standalone.Too: When enabled, the preview window will be movable and not constrained to the right side of the gene picker window.
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Controller.Pawn.Button.Recycle: Clear all information from this Pawn.
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Controller.Pawn.Button.Infocar: Open detailed information about this Pawn.
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Render.Zoom.Slider.Label: Zoom
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Render.Zoom.Slider.Tooltip: Set the camera zoom on the preview.
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Pawn.Backstory.None.Name: No Backstory
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Abilities.None.Label: No Abilities
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Traits.None.Label: No Traits
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Resources.Label: Resources
LanguageData.Karda.XPP.Resources.None.Label: No Resources
